skills.name: Song of the Toast
skills.description: Charlotte casually raises a glass to rally all allies. Grants all allies ATK Up for 2 turns, then grants self Lucky Token (Undispellable) for 3 turns and a stack of Ignition with a 75% chance, 3 times total. Grants self an extra turn.

skills.name: Cornered Rabbit
skills.description: Having lost all her chips, Charlotte flips the table and attacks the enemy. Deals 5% increased damage for each Ignition stack, up to 5 stacks, on attack, then removes all Ignition stacks after attacking. Resets the cooldown of Cornered Rabbit if Ignition is at max stacks after attacking.

skills.name: Rabbit's Luck
skills.description: Charlotte grants herself 1 stack of Ignition at the start of the turn of a Sun Attribute ally (excluding self). Increases self Action Gauge by 6% after using Bunny Step. Triggers Bunny Step an additional time after using Bunny Step on self turn if self has Lucky Token (Undispellable). Additional trigger occurs once per turn.

levels.description: Charlotte grants herself 1 stack of Ignition at the start of the turn of a Sun Attribute ally (excluding self). Increases self Action Gauge by 6% after using Bunny Step. Triggers Bunny Step an additional time after using Bunny Step on self turn if self has Lucky Token (Undispellable). Additional trigger occurs once per turn.

levels.description: Increases Charlotte's ATK by 5%. Charlotte grants herself 1 stack of Ignition at the start of the turn of a Sun Attribute ally (excluding self). Additional trigger occurs once per turn.

Additional trigger occurs once per turn.
